content: History rewrite (filter-repo/BFG) changes all SHAs: force push, disable branch protection, invalidates open PR diffs, breaks anything pinned to hashes, stale clones merging back re-contaminate history with doubled commits. GitHub docs: merge/close PRs first, delete old clones. For a non-secret archive, plain git rm commit (no rewrite) is low-risk; rewrite only justified for secrets.
